Just across the highway from "Ted Mcnair's Discount Autos" are a couple apple trees. You'll have to park somewhere off the road, probably; there's not much shoulder to speak of. Park at Ted's and grab a few "Public Harvest Discount Apples" for him and his crew
Right off of Finley Loop Road is a lovely apple tree. Chip and Clare know it as well, and can vouch for its bodacious bounty.

There's an apple tree here, on the southern edge of Coquille Valley Art Center Road. Bring a satchel full to your next Still Life drawing class; nothing looks more beautiful than freshly picked fruit!

Okay, so there are thimbleberries and huckleberries to be found all over the country roads, yes; but the ones at the junction of Fishtrap Road and Fat Elk always look so lovely, this writer thought they merited mention. The east-facing slope seems to be doing
